why: New behavioral node sdd/ssa-lowering (concept orchestration) -- the SSA-lowering doctrine, op2-m4 / issue #189 star capstone SECOND half: the reasoning front-end that lowers a change-request write-set into a partitioned set of Missions above the shipped deterministic back-end (mission-graph/touch-set-correction/collision-ladder). Artifact-type = skill (agent-configuration): the judgment CANNOT be unit-tested (a call, not a pure function -- hard user directive), so it is graded via ACED @rubric scenarios with boolean guards for the structural invariants a valid cut must never break. Suite: 1 @trigger outline (4 should-apply + 4 sibling near-misses that must NOT fire: single-node change / add-one-scenario / run ready-cycles / classify-collision), 12 @rubric (Oracle stale-kill + misaligned-kill + re-check-at-frontier; Architect barrier-hoist + screaming placement; SSA cohesion/no-over-split; cross-CR regroup; WAW->versioned-RAW; irreducible-hard; monadic frontier; conservative-first -- each with negative dimensions so a wrong cut scores low), 6 boolean guards (killed-CR->zero missions; single-writer; barrier-never-normal-node; no-concurrent-writers; provenance+local-ref; no-fabricated-dependency). Cold aced-spec-validator round 1 ALIGNED true (oracle/builder/architect all PASS; near-misses + rubric thresholds judged genuinely discriminating; scope clean). It flagged 2 additive coverage gaps -- Oracle misaligned-kill (only stale was graded) and monadic re-check-at-frontier (activation-only) -- both CLOSED additively before freeze, plus a README note that shown-work rubric dimensions presume the v1 by-hand decision-evidence record (automated emit = SQ-F5 #194, deferred). No open markers. Scope discipline held: shipped back-end + F5 emit (#194) + SQ-name (#195) + SQ-intake (#196) cited-not-built. HIGH blast (new SDD planning doctrine); leash auto-none -- human-ratified in-session by unional. This mission closes #189.

Cold aced-impl-judge ran the frozen ssa-lowering.feature over N=3 runs per @rubric via aced-case-judge + directly evaluated the @trigger outline (8/8 rows) and 6 boolean guards. IMPLEMENTATION_PASS true, BLOCKER null: all 18 frozen scenarios pass. Every @rubric aggregated above its inline threshold incl. the three risky discriminators -- Step 4 explicitly separates order-imposable(->versioned-RAW) from order-less co-write(->irreducible-hard) and forbids mislabeling the former irreducible; Step 5 separates conservative-first-on-unproven-overlap from proven-independence(no fabricated edge). Structural read sound: 6-step body maps one-to-one onto the suite; cites-not-reimplements the shipped back-end (mission-graph records / collision-ladder classifies / touch-set-correction reconciles, all sibling paths resolve on disk); in-scope (SQ-F5 #194 emit by-hand, SQ-name #195 working-name kept, SQ-intake #196 not built); agent-first skill-design (dense, no rationale prose, user-invocable:false internal). Delivered skill plugins/sdd/skills/ssa-lowering/SKILL.md + README, registered in sdd root spec.md (capability-map row + regenerated orchestration concept-index). Rebased onto origin/main; pnpm verify green 21/21, mg cycles empty. Impl gate clean (no reject -> no correction line). Non-blocking judge note: a few @rubric Givens echo the skill's worked examples (weak discriminators) -> future add-scenario hardening, filed as follow-up, not a gate defect. HIGH blast; leash auto-none -- human-ratified in-session by unional. Closes #189.
